name: Process Baselining: Process Hash
notes: Enable this rule to create a baseline of process hashes found in your environment.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches File Hash (custom) is not N/A
TD_list: APPLY Process Baselining: Process Hash on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches File Hash (custom) is not N/A
RED_list: Add the "File Hash" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Profiled Process Hashes"
